metadata.title: Estrenos LATAM — From global content to real results in every market
metadata.description: A strategic-operational partner specialized in execution and distribution optimization for audiovisual content across Central America, Panama, and the Caribbean.

footer.tagline: From global content to real results in every market.

home.heroTitle: From global content to real results in every market.
home.heroSubtitle: We turn distribution strategy into precise execution — from planning to final delivery in theaters.
home.heroCta: Talk to us about your next release

pillars.heading: The five pillars of our operation

operationalExecution.title: High-Level Operational Execution
operationalExecution.description: Direct control over DCP, materials, logistics, and multi-territory coordination.

marketIntelligence.title: Real Market Intelligence
marketIntelligence.description: Decisions backed by data, direct experience, and country-level knowledge.

costEfficiency.title: Efficiency and Cost Control
costEfficiency.description: Optimization from strategy down to micro-level operational cost.

strategicConnection.title: Strategic Connection
strategicConnection.description: Access to distributors, exhibitors, and key suppliers in every territory.

globalLocalTranslation.title: Global–Local Translation
globalLocalTranslation.description: Adapting international strategy to the operational reality of each local market.

marketTeaser.heading: One territory, three markets, one execution.
marketTeaser.body: We coordinate Central America, Panama, and the Caribbean as a connected operation, not isolated shipments.

partners.heading: A distribution network in the making
partners.caption: Illustrative sample of the partner network — real names coming soon.

post1.excerpt: Operational criteria that go beyond commercial reach.

post3.excerpt: Multi-territory coordination without losing local execution.

ctaBand.subtext: Tell us what content you want to bring to Central America, Panama, or the Caribbean.

hero.title: Where others design or distribute, we make sure it works.
hero.lede: We're the strategic-operational partner that turns global content into real results across Central America, Panama, and the Caribbean.

mission.quote: Content doesn't fail on paper. It fails in execution.
mission.body: We exist to guarantee that strategy gets executed, not just designed: that every release reaches the right market, at the right time, with operational execution that maximizes its result.

positioning.heading: Ideal positioning
positioning.step1: We define entry and positioning strategy.
positioning.step2: We identify the right distribution partners.
positioning.step3: We control real execution — including DCP and materials.
positioning.emphasis: Where others design or distribute, we make sure it works.

beliefs.heading: What we believe
beliefs.belief1: Operational execution defines the final result.
beliefs.belief2: Strategy without implementation has no impact.
beliefs.belief3: Operational details are where value is lost or won.
beliefs.belief4: Efficiency isn't savings: it's competitive advantage.
beliefs.belief5: Operational speed and precision produce results.
beliefs.belief6: Not knowing your agreements can cost you your rights.

pillarsRecap.heading: The foundation of every operational decision

team.heading: Team
team.caption: Real profiles coming soon — illustrative team structure.

brandPromise.quote: We make sure your content doesn't just have the right strategy, but that it's executed efficiently and works in every market — technically, operationally, and commercially.

ctaBand.heading: Let's talk about your next release.
ctaBand.subtext: Tell us what content you want to bring to Central America, Panama, or the Caribbean.

hero.title: One operational process, seven concrete steps.
hero.lede: From entry strategy to final quality control, this is how we execute every release across Central America, Panama, and the Caribbean.

services.intro: Every release goes through the same process, built to minimize risk and maximize the result in theaters.

strategicConsulting.title: Strategic Consulting
strategicConsulting.description: We define entry strategy, positioning, and launch plans for each market, before moving a single operational piece.

partnerSelection.title: Partner Selection
partnerSelection.description: We evaluate and select distributors based on their real performance in each territory, not just their commercial reach.

costOptimization.title: Cost Optimization
costOptimization.description: We review every stage of distribution to reduce costs without sacrificing quality or missing deadlines.

materialsManagement.title: Materials Management
materialsManagement.description: We coordinate technical and creative materials, making sure they arrive complete, on time, and in the right format.

dcpExecution.title: DCP Execution
dcpExecution.description: We directly supervise DCP execution, from delivery through to projection in theaters.

multiTerritoryCoordination.title: Multi-Territory Coordination
multiTerritoryCoordination.description: We synchronize operations across Central America, Panama, and the Caribbean as a single process, not isolated shipments.

qualityAssurance.title: Quality Assurance
qualityAssurance.description: We check timing, quality, and execution at every stage, keeping the project ready for a studio audit at any moment.

ctaBand.heading: Let's talk about your next release.
ctaBand.subtext: Tell us what content you want to bring to Central America, Panama, or the Caribbean.

hero.title: Three territories, one operation.
hero.lede: Central America, Panama, and the Caribbean aren't isolated markets, they're a single operational territory, coordinated from strategy through to the theater.

centralAmerica.description: Five markets with their own dynamics, coordinated as a single process of entry, partner selection, and execution.

highlights.network: Distributors and exhibitors evaluated country by country, not a single partner for the whole region.
highlights.logistics: Materials and DCP coordination timed to each market's own release schedule.
highlights.intelligence: Country-level performance reads, not regional averages that hide real differences.

panama.description: A bridge market between Central America and the Caribbean, with its own operational demands given its regional role.

highlights.network: Direct relationships with the territory's key exhibitors.
highlights.logistics: DCP and materials execution aligned with its function as a regional hub.
highlights.intelligence: Constant monitoring of theatrical performance and local audience behavior.

caribbean.description: Initial presence in representative markets, expanding progressively as new operational partners are confirmed.

highlights.network: Active distributor selection per market, without assuming uniform regional coverage.
highlights.logistics: Materials management adapted to each territory's island logistics.
highlights.intelligence: Case by case evaluation before committing to a launch strategy.

coordination.heading: One operational standard across all three territories.
coordination.body: Every market has its own dynamics, but execution follows a single process, controlled end to end, so no territory is left to chance.

ctaBand.heading: Let's talk about your next release.
ctaBand.subtext: Tell us what content you want to bring to Central America, Panama, or the Caribbean.
